faqs.question: Why do I have crickets in my Bushwick apartment or business?
faqs.answer: Crickets are attracted to warmth, moisture, and food sources commonly found in Bushwick buildings. Older construction with basement access, gaps around windows and doors, and proximity to green spaces like Maria Hernandez Park or overgrown lots can all contribute to cricket entry. They often seek shelter indoors during cooler months or dry periods.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 cricket control service?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control service includes a thorough property inspection, identification of entry points and harborage areas, targeted treatment using safe and effective methods, exclusion recommendations, and a follow-up visit if needed. Pricing varies based on property size, infestation severity, and treatment complexity.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate crickets from my Bushwick property?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations show significant improvement within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within 1-2 weeks depending on the severity of the infestation. We offer same-day or next-day service throughout Bushwick and can schedule emergency appointments for severe cases.

faqs.question: Are your cricket control treatments safe for pets and children in Bushwick homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we prioritize the safety of your family and pets by using EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques. Our technicians will provide specific instructions if any temporary precautions are needed, but our treatments are designed to be safe for residential environments while effectively eliminating crickets.
